page.title: Category:Articles needing translation from Japanese Wikipedia

revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]Created page with 'Until the servers catch up, see [[:Category:Japanese articles needing translation]]. ~~~~ [[Category:WikiProject Japan]] [[Category:Wikipedia articles needing tran...'
revision.text:
Until the servers catch up, see [[:Category:Japanese articles needing translation]]. [[User:Calliopejen1|Calliopejen1]] ([[User talk:Calliopejen1|talk]]) 18:48, 16 February 2009 (UTC)
[[Category:WikiProject Japan]] [[Category:Wikipedia articles needing translation]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japan]] [[Category:Articles needing translation from foreign-language Wikipedias]]

revision.comment: cleanup notices etc using [[Project:AutoWikiBrowser|AWB]]
r2.5.4) (Robot: Adding [[ru:Категория:Википедия:Запросы на перевод с японского]]
revision.text:
{{Transcat |language=Japanese}} [[Category:WikiProject Japan]]
[[ru:Категория:Википедия:Запросы на перевод с японского]]

revision.comment: added {{Polluted category}} using [[Project:AWB|AWB]] (8759)
[[User:Addbot|Bot:]] Migrating 1 interwiki links, now provided by [[Wikipedia:Wikidata|Wikidata]] on [[d:q8267694]]
more appropriate parent category (this isn't specifically a wikiproject category)
/* top */adding [[template:Filter deep category by topic]] as per request at [[WP:AWBREQ]]
11 revisions imported from [[:wikipedia:Category:Articles_needing_translation_from_Japanese_Wikipedia]]
Copying from [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] to [[Category:Articles tagged as templates and modules]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (204 members)
Bot: tidy & size tag (119 members)
Bot: tidy & size tag (118 members)
Bot: append category metadata
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]" to "[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]]"
Bot: remove obsolete category Articles tagged as templates and modules
Bot: remove obsolete category Categories with 118 members
Bot: remove obsolete category Confirmed enwiki categories
Bot: remove obsolete category Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata zh
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Text replacement - "This category was confirmed from zh→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was confirmed from zh→Wikidata links on "
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Text replacement - "↵.↵" to " "
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q8267694)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
Text replacement - "{{draft categories|↵}}" to ""
Text replacement - "{{wikidata link|" to "[[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata]]{{Wikidata link|"

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata"
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:categories missing wikidata]]" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata old]]"
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q8267694)
Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "qq"
Text replacement - "{{Wikidata link|" to "{{wikidata link|"
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories in Categories in qq but actually having wikidata but actually having wikidata]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Qq old]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text: <!--templates--> {{polluted category}} {{Transcat |language=Japanese}} {{Filter deep category by topic}} {{CatAutoTOC}} {{wikidata link|Q8267694}} <!--interwikis--> [[en:Category:Articles needing translation from Japanese Wikipedia]] [[it:Category:Tradurre dalla lingua giapponese]] [[ru:Category:Википедия:Запросы на перевод с японского]] [[uk:Category:Статті, які варто перекласти з японської]] [[zh:Category:需要從日語維基百科翻譯的條目]] <!--categories--> [[Category:sn_crud|TESTThis category was confirmed from zh→Wikidata links on 72 pentads]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Japan Wikipedia administration|translation]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments; consolidate 5 interlanguage link(s) into wikidata link template; add 3 sitelink pair(s) from Wikidata; check_date=2026-05-09 [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/25595991611|time triggered pipeline]]
